prompt: What is the longest river in the world
answer:
On-device  Context aware
Search in this chat...
The longest river in the world is generally considered to be the Amazon River, though the Nile River is also frequently cited depending on the measurement criteria used.*Amazon River: Often cited as the longest river by many modern studies, particularly when considering its entire basin.*Nile River: Historically held the title of the longest river for many years.Because the measurement of river's source and mouth can vary, there is some ongoing debate among geographers.
